news.title: Australian judge rejects US Marine pilot's appeal against extradition to US
news.snippet: An Australian judge has rejected an appeal by former U.S. Marine Corps pilot Daniel Duggan to avoid extradition to the United States over allegations that...

news.title: 'Into the hands of Trump': Dan Duggan's bid to avoid extradition fails
news.snippet: In short: A bid by former US Marine Corps pilot Daniel Duggan to avoid extradition to the United States has failed in the Federal Court.

news.title: Former US Marine Daniel Duggan to be extradited to the United States
news.snippet: A Federal Court has dismissed former US Marine Corp pilot Dan Duggan's bid to avoid extradition from Australia.

news.title: Daniel Duggan: Australian citizen and ex-US Marine pilot loses extradition appeal
news.snippet: Daniel Duggan was arrested in 2022 over claims he illegally trained the Chinese military in South Africa.

news.title: New study on which foods might preserve your brain health
news.snippet: Neurologist Dr. Leah Croll breaks down what the MIND diet is and what new research shows.
